mapper.select: SELECT tr.review_id, tr.topic_id, tr.review_result, tr.review_comment, tr.review_time, COALESCE(t.teacher_name, '管理员') AS admin_name FROM topic_review tr LEFT JOIN user_account ua ON tr.admin_id = ua.user_id LEFT JOIN teacher t ON ua.related_id = t.teacher_id AND ua.role = 'ADMIN' WHERE tr.topic_id = #{topicId} ORDER BY tr.review_time DESC
